name: SGM-V2.01 (General MIDI, mid-tier reference)
notes: gainOffsetDb derived from ffmpeg ebur128 integrated-loudness measurement across 10 mf middle-register samples (violin A4, viola D4, cello C3, flute C5, oboe C5, clarinet C4, trumpet C4, horn F3, piano Cs4, violin-section A4): mean = -36.71 LUFS. Target -18 LUFS => raw offset +18.71 dB, clamped to the +/-12 dB range => +12.0 dB. Samples rendered dry (fluidsynth reverb+chorus disabled) from the SGM-V2.01.sf2 GM soundfont via fluidsynth 2.5.6 fast-render, velocity 96 (mf), 48kHz/16-bit stereo, one note per invocation, every 2 semitones per instrument practical range, no loop points (natural decay/release tail kept, leading silence trimmed to ~10ms).
